infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TagAlong uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TagAlong uses the microphone to record audio clips that stay with your in-app creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TagAlong accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: TagAlong will notify you when it officially launches.
